title: Lnk
desc: A fullstack URL shortening platform with custom aliases, link analytics, and a responsive dashboard. Built with a Spring Boot REST API, React frontend, and PostgreSQL persistence.

title: Keeping Tabs
desc: A collaborative expense management application for tracking shared bills, balances, and payments between groups. Designed to simplify splitting costs and keeping everyone accountable.

title: Deadlock Arena Gamemode
desc: A custom multiplayer gamemode featuring matchmaking, player progression, and persistent data storage. Built with C# and SQLite to manage game state and player statistics.
